question: Based on the quarterly platform engagement distribution, what can be concluded about the trend of 'Support Tickets' over the year?

options.A: The chart normalizes unrelated categories to 100% per quarter, so it only shows the share of support tickets and cannot establish an absolute increasing or decreasing trend without the underlying totals.
options.B: Support tickets clearly increase in absolute number from Q1 to Q4 because their segment becomes larger in later quarters.
options.C: Support tickets clearly decrease in absolute number from Q1 to Q4 because their segment becomes smaller in later quarters.
options.D: Support tickets remain constant in absolute number across all quarters, as indicated by the 100% height of each bar.

explanation: The chart normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. It can suggest that the share of a metric is higher in later quarters, but it cannot establish an absolute increasing trend without the underlying totals. A higher percentage share does not necessarily mean a higher absolute quantity.
